lane.title: 08 WABA Outreach
lane.last_task: Verify deployed WABA voucher funnel for Meta retargeting
lane.last_summary: Read WABA lane memory and verified deployed HE GitHub main whatsapp.js voucher path. Trigger phrase 'Hi Hamza, send my WhatsApp voucher' and fallbacks like 'voucher' route to handleVoucherIntro, source meta_rt_voucher, VOUCHER_CAMPAIGN HE_RT_WABA_VOUCHER_ALL_20260523, wa_voucher_claims code generation HE-xxxxx, intro Claim Voucher button, post-claim Full Menu/Voucher Offers/Open Maps buttons, offer selection updates selected_offer and sends combo/roll product lists with text fallback. No customer send performed.
lane.next_action: Owner/test-number verification should send exact prefill phrase, claim voucher, click offers/maps/menu, then verify wa_voucher_claims row and staff redemption handling before any public Meta WABA launch.
lane.mutation_status: read-only code/deployment verification only; no WABA send/template/payment/Odoo mutation
